seoDescription: Latest news, product announcements, and technical updates from Capxon. Stay informed about new capacitor technologies and industry developments.

articles.title: Capxon Expands Automotive Capacitor Product Line
articles.summary: Capxon announces expanded AEC-Q200 qualified capacitor series for automotive applications including EV charging and LED lighting.
articles.content: Capxon Electronics has announced the expansion of its automotive-grade capacitor product line with new AEC-Q200 qualified series targeting electric vehicle charging systems, LED lighting, and onboard electronics. The new AF and AH series offer extended temperature ratings up to 150°C and enhanced reliability for demanding automotive environments. These capacitors have passed rigorous automotive qualification testing including temperature cycling, vibration, and mechanical shock tests per AEC-Q200 requirements. LiTong Electronics, as an authorized distributor, provides full technical support and PPAP documentation for these automotive-grade capacitors.
articles.author: Capxon Electronics

articles.title: Capxon Achieves IATF 16949 Automotive Quality Certification
articles.summary: Capxon's manufacturing facilities receive IATF 16949 certification, reinforcing commitment to automotive quality standards.
articles.content: Capxon Electronics is pleased to announce that its manufacturing facilities have achieved IATF 16949:2016 certification, the international standard for quality management systems in the automotive industry. This certification demonstrates Capxon's commitment to meeting the stringent quality requirements of automotive customers. The certification covers all aspects of capacitor manufacturing from raw material procurement to final product testing. Combined with existing AEC-Q200 qualifications, this certification positions Capxon as a premier supplier of automotive-grade aluminum electrolytic capacitors.
articles.author: Capxon Electronics

articles.title: Capxon Introduces New High-Temperature Capacitor Series
articles.summary: New KT and SH series capacitors offer 150°C temperature rating for extreme environment applications.
articles.content: Capxon has introduced new high-temperature capacitor series designed for applications requiring extended temperature capability. The KT radial series and SH snap-in series are rated for operation up to 150°C, making them ideal for industrial and automotive applications in harsh thermal environments. These capacitors utilize advanced electrolyte formulations and construction techniques to achieve reliable performance at extreme temperatures. The new series complements Capxon's existing product portfolio and provides designers with more options for demanding applications.
articles.author: Capxon Electronics

articles.title: LiTong Electronics Expands Capxon Distribution Partnership
articles.summary: LiTong Electronics strengthens partnership with Capxon to provide enhanced technical support and inventory for Asian markets.
articles.content: LiTong Electronics is pleased to announce the expansion of its distribution partnership with Capxon Electronics. This enhanced partnership includes increased local inventory of popular capacitor series, dedicated FAE support for Capxon products, and faster response times for technical inquiries. Customers will benefit from shorter lead times, local technical support, and comprehensive application engineering assistance. The partnership reinforces LiTong's commitment to providing high-quality capacitor solutions with exceptional service and support.
articles.author: LiTong Electronics

articles.title: Capxon Announces Environmental Sustainability Initiatives
articles.summary: Capxon commits to carbon neutrality by 2035 and expands RoHS-compliant product offerings.
articles.content: Capxon Electronics has announced comprehensive environmental sustainability initiatives including a commitment to achieve carbon neutrality in manufacturing operations by 2035. The company is expanding its portfolio of environmentally friendly products, including lead-free and halogen-free capacitor options. Capxon's manufacturing facilities have implemented energy-efficient processes and waste reduction programs. These initiatives align with global environmental regulations and customer requirements for sustainable electronics manufacturing. All Capxon capacitors continue to meet RoHS and REACH compliance requirements.
articles.author: Capxon Electronics

articles.title: Capxon and LiTong Host Technical Seminar Series
articles.summary: Upcoming technical seminars on aluminum electrolytic capacitor selection and application best practices.
articles.content: Capxon Electronics and LiTong Electronics are jointly hosting a series of technical seminars focused on aluminum electrolytic capacitor selection and application. The seminars will cover topics including capacitor selection criteria, derating recommendations, thermal management, and reliability considerations. Application engineers from both companies will present real-world case studies and answer technical questions. The seminars are designed for design engineers, component engineers, and purchasing professionals involved in power supply and electronic system design. Registration is now open for the upcoming sessions.
articles.author: LiTong Electronics
